INTEGER.description: Signed integer numeric type for whole number arithmetic

REAL.description: Floating-point numeric type for decimal arithmetic

STRING.description: Character string type for text data

BOOLEAN.description: Logical type with values TRUE and FALSE

RECORD.description: Structured type containing named fields of potentially different types

ARRAY.description: Fixed-size indexed collection of elements of the same type

POINTER.description: Reference type that holds the memory address of a value
